rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into implementation scopes when binding implementation-level signal routing, not component types.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by anchoring AGREE annexes to the exact component or implementation scope where the routed features are declared.
Only reference ports or variables that are explicitly exposed in the AADL model's implementation layer.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes in implementation scope must use subcomponent ports or declared variables, not component type ports directly.
Assignments and contracts in implementation annexes must not reference AADL properties or event ports as numeric/Boolean values.
anti_patterns: Do not place output dependency guarantees in implementation scope — use assignment for bindings only.
Do not encode AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) or event ports as AGREE variables or Boolean values.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
